rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (the system is called 'ModelPredictiveSafety' but the described control loop is reactive, not predictive).
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested.
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors (the safety envelope is insufficient for human speeds > 1.2 m/s) and harmful content (implication of validation with real humans).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
